articles.title: SEC Still Against Spot-based Bitcoin ETFs. Is There A Light At The End Of The Tunnel?
articles.description: With the approvals of futures bitcoin ETFs, firms have taken it one step further and have applied with the Securities and Exchanges Commission (SEC) for spot-based bitcoin ETFs. However, unlike their futures and short counterparts, the spot ETFs have not found favor in the eyes of the regulatory watchdog. And as more spot-based bitcoin ETF applications are declined by the SEC, questions have...

articles.description: The 2022 crypto market crash has, so far, ensured that almost every cryptocurrency received a deep discount.
